rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range bounds in type contracts
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible variables or features
Use `assume` and `guarantee` keywords with labeled expressions
Equation and constant declarations must use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names and timing properties
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
